steps.title: Track the cause and result
steps.content: The first sentence says Leda orbits Jupiter in the same direction Jupiter rotates. The next sentence gives the consequence of that fact: Leda's orbit is described as prograde.

steps.title: Rule out noncausal transitions
steps.content: A would correct a misconception, B would mark contrast, and D would mark sequence. The sentence needs a transition showing that the label follows from the orbital direction. The answer is C.
